review_text: The dashboard is clean and easy to understand, but the mobile layout feels cramped when I review tasks on the go.
I lost my saved filters twice this week. It makes the reporting workflow feel unreliable for our weekly planning.
Setup was fast and the templates helped our team start tracking work immediately.
The CSV import failed with a vague error message. I had to guess which column caused the issue.
Notifications are useful, but I get too many duplicate alerts for the same task update.
The new timeline view is excellent for sprint planning. It replaced two separate spreadsheets for us.
Search results are inconsistent. Sometimes exact task titles do not appear unless I refresh the page.
I like the clean UI, but bulk editing tasks is still slower than expected for large projects.
Permissions are confusing. A viewer on my team was able to see a project draft they should not have accessed.
The product feels polished and reliable. Our team adopted it without much training.
The export feature works, but the downloaded report formatting needs cleanup before sending to leadership.
Recurring tasks are the main reason we switched. They work exactly how our operations team expected.
The app becomes noticeably slow when a workspace has more than a few thousand tasks.
I wish comments supported better formatting. Long feedback threads are hard to scan.
Customer support helped us fix our import issue quickly, but the product should have explained the problem clearly.
The onboarding checklist made the first week smooth for our team.
Integrations with calendar tools are unreliable. Some task deadlines do not sync until hours later.
The analytics page gives useful visibility, but I need clearer definitions for each metric.
I could not find where to manage billing. The settings navigation feels scattered.
Great collaboration features. Mentions, assignments, and status updates keep everyone aligned.
The product is useful, but empty states do not explain what to do next when a workspace has no tasks.
Audit logs are essential for us, but filtering them by user or project is too limited.
The mobile app crashes when I attach large screenshots to a task.
The product has saved our project managers hours each week, especially with reusable workflows.
I like the concept, but the learning curve is higher than expected for non-technical team members.
